title: hornungia alpina subsp. font-queri
intro: Hornungia alpina subsp. font-queri, also known as Hornungia font-queri, is a subspecies of the Hornungia alpina plant, which is a type of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It is a rare, endemic plant found in the Iberian Peninsula and is traditionally used in herbal medicine. The medicinal properties of Hornungia alpina subsp. font-queri include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and other polyphenolic compounds. The plant is used to prepare herbal teas and infusions that are believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving respiratory health, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
